questionHtml: Which describes an exothermic reaction?

meta.title: Which describes an exothermic reaction?
breadcrumbLabels: Reactivity 1.1.2—Reactions are described as endothermic or exothermic, depending on the direction of energy transfer between the system and the surroundings. Understand the temperature change (decrease or increase) that accompanies endothermic and exothermic reactions, respectively.
